Package org.eventb.core.ast.extension

Interface IPredicateExtension2

All Superinterfaces:
IFormulaExtension, IPredicateExtension
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension2, ExtensionHelper.AlphaPredicateExtension, Prime
public interface IPredicateExtension2 extends IPredicateExtension
Common protocol for predicate extensions. This interface adds the verifyType method for better performance. It should be used instead of IPredicateExtension whenever possible.
Since:
3.6

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface org.eventb.core.ast.extension.IFormulaExtension

    boolean
    verifyType(Expression[] childExprs, Predicate[] childPreds)
    Verifies that the type of the given children is coherent with the semantics of this predicate extension.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.ast.extension.IPredicateExtension

    typeCheck

  • Method Details

    • verifyType

      boolean verifyType(Expression[] childExprs, Predicate[] childPreds)
      Verifies that the type of the given children is coherent with the semantics of this predicate extension. It is guaranteed that all children are well-typed and that their types are compatible with each other.
      Parameters:
      childExprs - the child expressions
      childPreds - the child predicates
      Returns:
      true iff the children types are coherent, false otherwise
